channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bellingham strikes late for Real Madrid in 3-2 win at Man City in Champions League 1st leg playoff
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Real Madrid’s Galacticos just don’t know when they are beaten. Manchester City just keep on making the same mistakes. Jude Bellingham’s stoppage-time goal sealed a stunning comeback for Madrid and a 3-2 lead in its Champions League playoff against City.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Brandon Ingram gets $120 million extension from Raptors shortly after being acquired
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Brandon Ingram has a $120 million extension from the Raptors before ever playing a game for Toronto. The recently acquired forward agreed to the deal Tuesday, less than a week after the Raptors got him from the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Boone says he hopes his team would handle title `with a little more class' than Dodgers
item.description: Three months after the World Series, Yankees manager Aaron Boone remained unhappy with some of the Los Angeles Dodgers’ remarks after they beat a sloppy New York team in five games for the title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dept of Education asks NCAA, high schools to erase records set by transgender athletes
item.description: The Department of Education has taken another step in advancing the Trump administration’s new transgender policy for sports by asking the NCAA and a key high-school sports organization to restore titles, awards and records it says have been “misappropriated by biological males competing in female c
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jason Kelce opens up about ‘mixed emotions’ after brother Travis Kelce loses to Eagles in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Jason Kelce is feeling "mixed emotions" after his brother Travis Kelce was defeated by his former team in Super Bowl LIX on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Champions League global rights deal set to be struck by U.S. agency Relevent with UEFA, clubs
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — UEFA and top European soccer clubs are set to drop the Swiss agency that has sold Champions League rights since 1992 and replace it with the U.S. firm of Miami Dolphins owner Stephen Ross.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fever make number of moves to give Caitlin Clark help, including superstar she had playoff spat with
item.description: The Indiana Fever got to work in the offseason to build upon a successful 2024 run and gave Caitlin Clark some more dynamic teammates to work with.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl averaged a record 127.7 million US viewers
item.description: Despite the game being a blowout, Sunday night’s Super Bowl averaged a record 127.7 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia’s 40-22 victory over Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Virginia's high school sports governing body to comply with Trump's 'Keeping Men Out of Women’s Sports' order
item.description: The Virginia High School League announced Monday that effective immediately they will be in compliance with Trump's "Keeping Men Out of Women's Sports" order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thoughts on the Chicago Bears from around the NFL on Radio Row during Super Bowl week
item.description: Chicago Bears new head coach Ben Johnson is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the team, while quarterback Caleb Williams is expected to elevate his game with the help of Johnson's expertise.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NBA adds Atlanta's Trae Young, Dallas' Kyrie Irving to All-Star Game as injury replacements
item.description: Atlanta guard Trae Young is headed to the NBA All-Star Game after all, and Dallas guard Kyrie Irving has been picked once again as well.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Secret Service unveils Super Bowl ad
item.description: “America was founded on an idea of freedom. America's always stepped forward in time of need throughout our short but powerful history,” says a voiceover in the video.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Padres sign outfielder/first baseman Connor Joe for 2025 season
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made a move to bolster their roster for the upcoming season by signing outfielder and first baseman Connor Joe to a one-year contract, President of Baseball Operations and General Manager A.J. Preller announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Big Game Bound: Breaking down the matchups headed into Super Bowl weekend
item.description: The Chiefs and Eagles will kickoff Super Bowl LIX in two days from the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans, both with hopes of being crowned the kings of the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Here's how the new NBA All-Star Game format works
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is coming to Chase Center for the first time on Feb. 16, but the game will not look like the All-Star Games that NBA fans are accustomed to.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Jazz acquire guard KJ Martin at trade deadline
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a busy trade deadline for the Utah Jazz, but when all the dust settled, the Jazz are coming away with one new player and five draft picks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NCAA changes transgender policy to limit women's competition to athletes assigned female at birth
item.description: The NCAA changed its participation policy for transgender athletes on Thursday, limiting competition in women's sports to athletes assigned female at birth only.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NCAA changes participation policy on transgender athletes
item.description: The NCAA has changed its participation policy for athletes, keeping transgender students from women's sports
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Daytona boss inspires students with his NASCAR journey
item.description: The "Super Bowl" of racing, the Daytona 500, will be the next biggest event in the world of sports, taking place February 16, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Davis Suppes, NewsNation

item.title: Penguins at the Birch Aquarium make their Super Bowl predictions
item.description: Some penguins at the Birch Aquarium at University of California, San Diego's Scripps Institution of Oceanography made their bets on which team will win the big game on Super Bowl Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: McDavid makes perfect pass in overtime as the Oilers beat the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor McDavid set up Zach Hyman in overtime, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Wednesday night. Hyman redirected McDavid's pass for the power-play goal at 1:36. It was Hyman's 19th goal and McDavid's 49th assist of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Edwards scores 49 to lead Wolves over short-handed Bulls 127-108
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 49 points, including 20 in the third quarter, as the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the short-handed Chicago Bulls 127-108 on Wednesday night. Edwards hit six 3-pointers and was 17 of 18 from the free-throw line and also added nine rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A huge National Signing Day: Coverage from six schools as 14 athletes sign
item.description: KREX Sports Anchors Big Will Levenson and Titus Cleveland have coverage from six different schools on a busy day.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: SDFC completes Sharp Healthcare Performance Center on Sycuan land
item.description: Almost three years in the making, San Diego FC’s Sharp Healthcare Performance Center is now complete.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5
